name: alife-sdk
description: Framework-agnostic A-Life simulation and AI SDK for game developers
author: Eugene Rusakov

scripts.build:sdk: pnpm --filter @alife-sdk/core build && pnpm --filter @alife-sdk/simulation build && pnpm --filter @alife-sdk/ai build && pnpm --filter @alife-sdk/economy build && pnpm --filter @alife-sdk/hazards build && pnpm --filter @alife-sdk/persistence build && pnpm --filter @alife-sdk/social build && pnpm --filter @alife-sdk/phaser build
